objective:
Objectif: Développer une stratégie de trading à court terme basée sur l'utilisation conjointe d'indicateurs uniques (EMA + OBV et BOLLINGER + STOCHASTIC) pour exploiter des breakouts de tendance en fonction du contexte macro-structurel, avec une prise en charge du risque non linéaire adaptée à la volatilité.

Analyse : Le marché est le 0GUSDC en 1h. Les indicateurs disponibles sont adx, amplitude_hunter, aroon, atr, bollinger, cci, donchian, ema, fear_greed, fibonacci_levels, ichimoku, keltner, macd, mfi, momentum, obv, onchain_smoothing, pi_cycle, pivot_points, psar, roc, rsi, sma, standard_deviation, stoch_rsi, stochastic, supertrend, volume_oscillator, vortex, vwap, williams_r.
Les filtres de session/horaire et liquidité sont ajoutés pour la mode_microstructure, tandis qu'une confirmation contrarienne partielle est imposée pour la mode_counter_consensus. Les axes hors sentiers battus incluront une gestion du risque non liné

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on combining unique indicators such as EMA, OBV and Bollinger Bands with Stochastic for trend exploitation in line with the macroeconomic context. It also includes risk management adapted to volatility. Weaknesses may include the complexity of the indicator combination or overfitting. If results are poor (negative return), a fallback contract could be automatically generated to maintain progression when the LLM is not exploitable and confirmational bias could be checked for partial contrarian aspect. For mediocre returns, adjustments in parameters such as timeframe, liquiditiy filters and confirmation type might help. An alternative approach would be trying other unique indicators or focusing on different market conditions.

If results remain poor, consider adjusting timeframe, liquiditiy filters or confirmation types to improve performance.': 'adjustments'}

iterations.hypothesis: Combining ATR based stop loss with RSI and Bollinger Bands to catch strong trending market conditions and limit drawdown during ranging markets.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy combines three indicators, RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR for identifying strong trending market conditions. It has filters to manage liquidity and sessions/hourly frequency. The hypothesis is that this combination will help catch strong trends while limiting drawdown during ranging markets. However, the backtest results so far have been poor with a negative return.
[Backup plan] 1. Weaknesses: A single run may not be sufficient for validation as market conditions change frequently. 2. If results are poor (negative returns), try adjusting filters to improve liquidity or increase confirmation of contrarian positions. 3. Parameter adjustments could include varying the RSI period, adjusting Bollinger Bands parameters, or tweaking ATR based stop loss settings. 4. Alternative approach: Test a different set of indicators for trend and volatility identification.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] The strategy currently focuses on combining unique indicators such as EMA, OBV and Bollinger Bands with Stochastic for trend identification. The hypothesis is to exploit breakouts in trends based on the macro-structural context while managing non-linear risk considering market volatility. Weaknesses could include overfitting the data or not sufficiently accounting for various market conditions. If results are poor (-108% return), adjusting filters and indicators, using more robust confirmation signals, or incorporating other market dynamics may be considered. For mediocre Sharpe (-20%), optimizing parameters to improve risk-reward ratio might prove useful. In case of failure, alternative strategies could include trend following with simple moving averages or employing a machine learning approach based on complex combinations of features.
